result.summary: Missed one side of the two-part request.

scenario=TC-09 Parallel Independence
prompt=What's the weather in London and the stock price of MSFT?
assistant=starting
assistant_turn_1=<tool_call>
{"name": "get_weather", "arguments": {"location": "London", "units": "celsius"}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_stock_price", "arguments": {"ticker": "MSFT"}}
</tool_call>
final_answer=<tool_call>
{"name": "get_weather", "arguments": {"location": "London", "units": "celsius"}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_stock_price", "arguments": {"ticker": "MSFT"}}
</tool_call>
verdict=fail
summary=Missed one side of the two-part request.
